title: elaeocarpus roseoalbus
intro: Elaeocarpus roseoalbus, also known as the White Panakan, is a species of flowering plant in the Elaeocarpaceae family. Traditionally, Elaeocarpus roseoalbus has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and treating skin conditions, due to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. Herbal preparations of Elaeocarpus roseoalbus include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and topical creams.
